display.purpose: One short dominant statement per major viewport.

headline.purpose: Orient and convert at section scale.

body.purpose: Explain product behavior in lines capped near 70 characters.

label.purpose: Configuration metadata, indexes, commands, and chips.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Color and opacity feedback on controls.

motion.name: directional
motion.purpose: Small arrow or icon translations that communicate direction.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-commitment action with compact geometry and decisive violet fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid var(--primary); border-radius: var(--ui-radius-control); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); padding: 12px 20px; font: 500 14px/1 var(--font-archivo); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 85%, var(--background)); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Low-commitment action on a graphite surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--ui-radius-control); background: var(--surface-raised); color: var(--foreground); padding: 12px 20px; font: 500 14px/1 var(--font-archivo); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--surface); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Cell
components.description: Fixed-header destination rendered as one adjoining ruled cell.
components.css: .ds-nav-cell { display: inline-flex; min-height: 64px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-right: 1px solid var(--rule); background: var(--background); color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 0 20px; font: 500 11px/1 var(--font-azeret-mono); letter-spacing: .08em; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-cell:hover { background: var(--muted); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-nav-cell:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Metadata Chip
components.description: Quiet technical summary used after explanatory content.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; min-height: 32px; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: var(--ui-radius-control); background: var(--surface); color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 8px 12px; font: 500 11px/1.45 var(--font-azeret-mono); letter-spacing: .12em; } .ds-chip span { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--primary); }

components.name: Framed Product Panel
components.description: Square product-explanation surface joined to the shared grid.
components.css: .ds-panel { border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 0; background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); padding: 20px; } .ds-panel small { display: block; color: var(--muted-foreground); font: 500 11px/1.45 var(--font-azeret-mono); letter-spacing: .12em; } .ds-panel strong { display: block; margin-top: 40px; font: 600 24px/1.1 var(--font-archivo); } .ds-panel p { max-width: 48ch; color: var(--muted-foreground); font: 400 14px/1.7 var(--font-archivo); } .ds-panel:focus-within { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Configuration Input
components.description: Compact field for project names and explicit configuration.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--muted-foreground); font: 500 11px/1.45 var(--font-azeret-mono); letter-spacing: .12em; } .ds-field input { min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--ui-radius-control); background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 14px/1 var(--font-azeret-mono); } .ds-field input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring); outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 35%, transparent); outline-offset: 1px; }

narrative.overview: Better T Stack should feel like a well-made infrastructure manual brought to life: exact, independent, and kinetic. A visible grid, explicit states, and compact technical metadata make complex architecture choices feel inspectable. The interface is dark-only because it lives beside editors and terminals in a developer's working environment, not because developer tools are expected to look neon or theatrical.
keyCharacteristics: Contiguous grid cells separated by a shared 1 px rule
Large, compressed Archivo statements paired with compact Azeret Mono metadata
Violet as the primary action color, with cyan, lime, and amber isolated by module
Product UI and CSS diagrams instead of stock imagery or decorative gradients
Mobile layouts recomposed into a single reading order with 44 px targets

rules.name: The Isolated Signal Rule
rules.body: A module owns one vivid family. Adjacent reading surfaces remain neutral so color continues to communicate state and category.

rules.name: The One Statement Rule
rules.body: Display type is for a single declarative message. Feature detail moves into body copy and metadata instead of competing in the same scale.

rules.name: The Structural Depth Rule
rules.body: If a surface needs hierarchy, change its position, rule, or tone. Do not add a shadow to compensate for weak structure.

dos: Do use the 1 px Structural Rule to join sections, controls, diagrams, and footer groups into one frame.
Do use semantic tokens from apps/web/src/app/global.css instead of raw Tailwind palette colors.
Do keep primary narrow-layout targets at least 44 px high.
Do place explanatory copy before product visuals when the layout collapses.
Do preserve visible focus, semantic headings, reduced-motion behavior, and keyboard access.
Do use commands, configuration, diagrams, and real output to explain the product.
donts: Don't copy Mistral's identity, logo, navigation, copy, color arrangement, pixel artwork, or proprietary imagery.
Don't use generic purple gradients, glowing glass cards, decorative terminal chrome, excessive shadows, or rounded-card grids as shorthand for developer tooling.
Don't split the product into unrelated light and dark visual systems or add a theme toggle.
Don't hide essential navigation or product information behind hover-only interaction.
Don't use gradient text or colored side-stripe borders greater than 1 px.
Don't wrap every section in an isolated card when a shared rule and clear spatial rhythm communicate the hierarchy.
